Text.Main: Hey there, freelancer.  Need some rest after a tough day of battle? Spend some time at the Apollo Well.

If you need some time to rest and regain your bearings, the Apollo Well is the place to go. You can relax, have a drink and even gamble a little if you choose. Plus, the Well is the only place in Apollo where you can get an excellent view of the business district. Why, I'd be there right now if I weren't on duty!
What sort of item do you need?
What sort of item do you need?  I have salvaged armor, projectile weapons, and power plants -- all top quality, needing only minor repairs.
What type of kit do you need?  Working or salvaged?
